title: Write Workflow Log Payload
description: Payload for POST /api/internal/workflow-logs. Records a single workflow execution event for observability.

workflow_name.description: Human-readable name of the n8n workflow (e.g. 'Daily — Orchestrator').

execution_id.description: n8n execution ID for cross-referencing logs with n8n execution history.

topic_slug.description: Topic slug when the event is scoped to a specific topic. Null for non-topic workflows.

date_key.description: Date key in YYYY-MM-DD format. Null for events not tied to a specific day.

event_type.description: Classification of the event. Use 'error' for failures, 'retry' for retry attempts, 'completed' for successful completion, 'warning' for non-fatal issues, and 'info' for checkpoints.

module_name.description: Name of the workflow node or sub-module where the event occurred (e.g. '02 Generate Summary').

error_message.description: Short, human-readable error description. Required when event_type is 'error' or 'retry'.

error_details.description: Full error details, stack trace, or extended diagnostic information.

metadata_json.description: JSON string with arbitrary structured context (e.g. attempt number, publish_job_id, input payload excerpt).

examples.error_details: HTTP 403 from GitHub API: rate limit exceeded. Resets at 2025-01-15T23:59:00Z.

examples.error_message: D1 batch write failed: network timeout
